description: Drag-and-drop file upload zone with built-in file browser, file list display with icons and sizes, removable items, and support for multiple files and accept filters.

parameters.name: OnFilesSelected
parameters.description: Fires when files are selected via click or drag-and-drop.

parameters.name: Multiple
parameters.description: Allow selecting multiple files at once.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true, the drop zone is disabled and no files can be selected.

parameters.name: MaxFileCount
parameters.description: Maximum number of files to accept from a single selection. Default 10.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class for the root element.

examples.title: Custom drop zone content
examples.code: Drop your CSV files here
